summary: P1 orchestration decomposition review follow-up closed: P2 artifact relocation governance now has schema-backed dependency audit automation and audited operator-only report relocation.

observations.surface: ops/reports generated artifact governance and P2 ops/operator migration
observations.problem: Several reports originally listed as operator-only are currently referenced by release closeout policies, fixed-point plans, schema samples, docs, or report-contract tests.
observations.why_it_matters: Moving those artifacts without a path-dependency audit can make public/export/release checks fail or silently downgrade release-authority evidence into operator-only evidence.
observations.automation_candidate: Implemented as make artifact-relocation-audit plus generated-artifact-index/artifact-freshness coverage for ops/operator/ and static tests for release source/archive exclusion.
observations.suggested_followup: Closed in this task: added artifact-relocation-audit script/schema/Make target, moved the audited operator-only operator-release-summary into ops/operator/, extended generated-artifact-index and artifact-freshness scanning to ops/operator/, and excluded ops/operator/ from release source-tree/archive fingerprints so operator reports cannot self-invalidate release evidence. Keep future artifact moves behind the relocation audit.
